task_completion.visual_evidence: The Juris-M main window is visible on the screen, displaying a library of legal references.

task_completion.description: The three specified cases are selected in the Juris-M library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The items 'Brown v. Board of Education', 'Miranda v. Arizona', and 'Gideon v. Wainwright' are highlighted in the Juris-M item list. No other items should be highlighted.

task_completion.description: The export dialog is opened for the selected items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A context menu showing 'Export Items...' is open, or the 'Export...' dialog box is visible on screen.

task_completion.description: RIS format is chosen for the export.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Export dialog box, the 'Format' dropdown menu is set to 'RIS'.

task_completion.description: The file is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog shows the file name 'landmark_cases.ris' and the directory '/home/ga/Documents/', or a file manager/terminal shows the file successfully created at this location.

integrity.description: The agent used the Juris-M graphical interface to perform the export.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Juris-M GUI (selecting items, opening menus, using export dialogs) rather than terminal commands generating the file.

integrity.description: The RIS file was not manually typed or copy-pasted into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) open with RIS formatted text being manually entered.

integrity.description: The agent exported only the selected items, not the entire library.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export action should be 'Export Items...' (which exports only selected items) rather than 'Export Library...'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires exporting exactly three cases: 'Brown v. Board of Education', 'Miranda v. Arizona', and 'Gideon v. Wainwright'. The export format must be RIS, and the destination file must be /home/ga/Documents/landmark_cases.ris. Ensure that other cases in the library (e.g., Marbury v. Madison, Obergefell v. Hodges, Tinker v. Des Moines) are NOT selected or exported.
